description: Repository-scan retrieval hints for the 17 race_condition_in_async_code subpatterns. Use this file to build a candidate set before applying the verdict-layer subpattern JSON files.

defaults.group_match_semantics: For grep_keywords_all_groups, every group should match at least one keyword before the candidate is treated as high-priority.
defaults.any_match_semantics: grep_keywords_any is only for weak recall and should not be used alone for risk judgment.
defaults.exclude_semantics: grep_keywords_exclude are soft down-rank hints by default unless the caller explicitly chooses hard exclusions.
defaults.rg_template_semantics: Prefer broad_recall first for speed. If repo layout may differ across versions or broad_recall is too sparse, run fallback_no_path. Use group_intersection only for optional narrowing after recall.
defaults.path_globs_semantics: path_globs are soft search-priority hints, not hard absence proofs. If broad_recall is empty or implausibly sparse, rerun fallback_no_path before concluding the pattern is absent.

entries.subpattern_key: DDL hook callback 写共享变量或标志无锁
entries.pattern_file: DDL_hook_callback_写共享变量或标志无锁.json
entries.first_pass_query_hint: 先找 DDL hook 注册点，再看 callback 内是否直接写外层共享变量。

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 先按路径优先范围做第一跳粗召回，快速看到当前版本目录结构下的候选位置。
rg_templates.command: rg -n -F -g 'pkg/ddl/**/*_test.go' -g 'tests/realtikvtest/**/*' -e SetHook -e OnJobUpdated -e OnJobRunBefore -e OnJobRunAfter -e 'checkOK =' -e 'jobID =' -e 'isPaused =' -e '.hook =' <repo_root>

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当目录重构、历史版本路径不同，或 broad_recall 结果过少时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底召回。
rg_templates.command: rg -n -F -e SetHook -e OnJobUpdated -e OnJobRunBefore -e OnJobRunAfter -e 'checkOK =' -e 'jobID =' -e 'isPaused =' -e '.hook =' <repo_root>

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 按关键词分组逐层收窄，只保留同时命中各组信号的候选文件，再定位最后一跳命中位置。
rg_templates.command: rg -l -0 -F -e SetHook -e OnJobUpdated -e OnJobRunBefore -e OnJobRunAfter -g 'pkg/ddl/**/*_test.go' -g 'tests/realtikvtest/**/*' <repo_root> | xargs -0 -r rg -l -0 -F -e 'err =' -e 'checkOK =' -e 'jobID =' -e 'isPaused =' -e 'test =' | xargs -0 -r rg -n -F -e 'go func' -e callback -e hook

rg_templates.intent: 按关键词分组逐层收窄，只保留同时命中各组信号的候选文件，再定位最后一跳命中位置。
rg_templates.command: rg -l -0 -F -e NewEncoder -g 'pkg/lightning/**/*_test.go' -g 'pkg/importer/**/*_test.go' <repo_root> | xargs -0 -r rg -l -0 -F -e processor -e 'chunk processor' | xargs -0 -r rg -n -F -e mock -e DoAndReturn

entries.subpattern_key: DDL callback 目标 job 过滤与单次触发控制

rg_templates.name: broad_recall
rg_templates.intent: 先按路径优先范围做第一跳粗召回，快速看到当前版本目录结构下的候选位置。
rg_templates.command: rg -n -F -g 'pkg/ddl/**/*_test.go' -g 'pkg/ddl/**/*' -e ActionTruncateTable -e job.Query -e JobStateSynced -e sync.Once -e OnJobUpdated <repo_root>

rg_templates.name: fallback_no_path
rg_templates.intent: 当目录重构、历史版本路径不同，或 broad_recall 结果过少时，去掉路径限制做全仓兜底召回。
rg_templates.command: rg -n -F -e ActionTruncateTable -e job.Query -e JobStateSynced -e sync.Once -e OnJobUpdated <repo_root>

rg_templates.name: group_intersection
rg_templates.intent: 按关键词分组逐层收窄，只保留同时命中各组信号的候选文件，再定位最后一跳命中位置。
rg_templates.command: rg -l -0 -F -e SetHook -e OnJobUpdated -e afterWaitSchemaSynced -g 'pkg/ddl/**/*_test.go' -g 'pkg/ddl/**/*' <repo_root> | xargs -0 -r rg -l -0 -F -e ActionTruncateTable -e job.Query -e JobStateSynced | xargs -0 -r rg -n -F -e once -e sync.Once -e 'only once'
